---
title: "Home"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/profile.png
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/serena-128
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/YOUR-LINKEDIN
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:YOUR-EMAIL@example.com
---

## Welcome

Hi, I’m **Serena Emedeke** — a student developing skills in **Python, data analysis, Quarto, Git, and digital presentation**.

::: {.callout-note}
This portfolio presents my **projects, technical development, reflection, and professional profile** in a structured and professional format.
:::

## Highlights

::: {.section-card}
### 📊 Technical Projects
Python-based work featuring data analysis, tables, and visualisations.
:::

::: {.section-card}
### 🧠 Reflection and Growth
Critical reflection on challenges, learning, and future goals.
:::

::: {.section-card}
### 📄 Professional Profile
My CV, background, strengths, and contact details.
:::

## Featured Projects

### Student Performance Analysis
A Python project exploring the relationship between study time and academic performance.  
[View Project](projects/list/project-1.qmd)

### Monthly Budget Analysis
A Python project analysing income and expenses using tabular and graphical output.  
[View Project](projects/list/project-2.qmd)
